title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
description: Verify that a user can successfully create an account by providing a valid email and a password that meets the minimum length requirement of 8 characters.

title: Account creation with duplicate email is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the email provided already exists in the system, enforcing the business rule that email must be unique.

title: Account creation with password less than 8 characters is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the password length is less than 8 characters, enforcing the minimum password length requirement.

title: Account creation with password exactly 8 characters is accepted
description: Verify that a password with exactly 8 characters is accepted as valid, testing the lower boundary of the password length requirement.

title: Account creation with password of 7 characters is rejected
description: Verify that a password with 7 characters is rejected, testing the boundary just below the minimum length requirement.

title: Email uniqueness validation is performed before account creation
description: Verify that the system checks for email uniqueness before proceeding with account creation, ensuring that duplicate emails are detected and rejected.

title: Password length validation is performed before account creation
description: Verify that the system validates the password length (minimum 8 characters) before proceeding with account creation, rejecting passwords that do not meet the requirement.

title: Race condition during concurrent account creation with same email
description: Verify that when multiple concurrent account creation requests are made with the same email, the system handles the race condition correctly and prevents duplicate accounts from being created.
